text.title: vui-testing-best-practices Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: 4-layer test plan for voice banking on custom-LLM agent.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Voice banking pre-launch QA. Custom-LLM agent (Realtime API). Audience EU + US.

section.title: Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. Test plan executed: non-native subgroup 22% lower accuracy → blocked launch; remediation funded.
